data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for time-off and PTO tracking.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the time-off and PTO tracking functionality. However, the provided evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the need for time-off and PTO tracking, but there are no concrete examples or evidence of this feature being tested or validated in the current saga run.
gaps: No evidence of time-off and PTO tracking functionality being tested or validated.
